## Proposal Summary
A clear and concise description of the proposed change or addition to the specification.

## Motivation
Why is this change necessary? What problem does it solve?

## Examples
Provide examples of how this would be used in practice.

## Alternatives Considered
A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered.
